subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God, Who hath revealed that which lay concealed behind the veils of the unseen, and sent down that which guideth all unto Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی اظهر ما کان مستورا فی حجب الغیب و انزل ما یهدی الکل الیه
subcodes.subjects: @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
